rationale: The page provides specific historical details regarding the Kakori Trial Case, including the location of the trial (Ring Theatre in Lucknow) and the names of the revolutionaries who received the death sentence.
cleanedText:
KAKORI SENTENCE
KAKORI TRIAL CASE - RING THEATRE in Lucknow
Death sentence - Ram Prasad Bismil, Ashfaq Ullah Khan, Rajendra Nath Lahiri, Roshan Singh
